description: EnvironmentVariableName comparisons in StringComparers and StringComparisons were using InvariantCultureIgnoreCase instead of OrdinalIgnoreCase. Environment variable names are programmatic ASCII identifiers, and OrdinalIgnoreCase is the correct choice — it avoids unexpected locale-sensitive case-folding (e.g., Turkish İ/ı rules).
name: Fix environment variable name comparison to use OrdinalIgnoreCase
